violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs and bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods relocated for proper storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the food shelving and display case has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. All non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
